items.label: How to Register a New Account

index.title: SSO Cendekia
index.description: This guide is intended for end users to be able to log in to applications connected to SSO Cendekia quickly and securely.

pengguna/daftar.title: How to Register a New Account

pengguna/faq.title: User FAQ
pengguna/faq.description: I have logged in but returned to the login page again

pengguna/login-sosial.title: Login with Google or Microsoft
pengguna/login-sosial.description: SSO Cendekia supports social login to make the login process faster.

pengguna/lupa-kata-sandi.title: Forgot Password
pengguna/lupa-kata-sandi.description: If you forget your password, use the following reset process.

pengguna/otorisasi-aplikasi.title: Application Access Approval (Consent)
pengguna/otorisasi-aplikasi.description: The first time you use a particular app, you may see an access approval page.
